# cloudless_default_images (Data Source)

All Fluence-curated default OS images suitable for boot disks.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudless_default_images" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `images` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))
